  • Module

  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
DataReceiver<T>
Implemented by controllers that need to receive data on navigation.
GameController
Controller for the main game screen.
GameManager
Encapsulates game state and core scoring/leveling rules.
GameStage
Legacy stage wrapper for the game screen.
Main
JavaFX application entry point that initializes navigation and shows the main menu.
MainMenuController
Controller for the main menu view.
NavigationAware
Implemented by controllers that need a reference to the NavigationManager.
NavigationManager
Centralizes JavaFX navigation by loading FXML views, wiring controllers, passing data, and reusing a single Stage instance.
ResultsController
Controller for the results screen that displays stats and offers retry/exit actions.
ResultsView
Legacy helper to show the results screen.
RulesController
Controller for the rules view.
UIStateManager
Manages UI state changes based on timer progress (critical mode, pulsing effects).
ViewRoutes
Logical route identifiers for FXML views used by NavigationManager.
WordApiClient
Fetches random Spanish words from public APIs with retries and fallbacks.
WordRepository
In-memory repository for the current list of words.
WordService
Coordinates word loading from APIs and exposes random word access to the game.
